stories.title: Sights, sounds and more moments from the final rou...
stories.summary: The top of the leaderboard is crowded at Aronimink. Follow along here.

stories.title: Sources: SGA wins MVP for second straight year
stories.summary: Thunder star Shai Gilgeous-Alexander has won his second consecutive NBA Most Valuable Player award, becoming the 14th player in league history to win back-to-back MVPs, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania.

stories.title: Rousey submits Carano by armbar in 17 seconds
stories.summary: Ronda Rousey's first MMA fight in 10 years lasted only 17 seconds, as the former UFC champion quickly submitted Gina Carano via armbar to win their main event bout.

stories.title: Win in Rome: Sinner's title is Italian Open histor...
stories.summary: Jannik Sinner became the first Italian man to win the Italian Open in 50 years and in the process became the second man after Novak Djokovic to win all nine Masters 1000 events.

stories.title: Mets' Holmes: Surgery still an option, but unlikel...
stories.summary: Mets pitcher Clay Holmes said he most likely won't need surgery on his fractured right fibula, but he is not completely ruling it out.
